mapper.sql: id, mock_name,request_type, mock_url, prefix_option, config_rules, weight, result_type, labe, other_mock_service, mock_result, tag, timeout, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
from mock_config where mock_url = #{mock_url,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by weight desc,update_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into mock_config (mock_name,request_type, mock_url, prefix_option, config_rules, weight, result_type, labe, other_mock_service, mock_result, tag, timeout,create_time, update_time) values (#{mockName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{requestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mockUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{prefixOption,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{configRules,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resultType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{labe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{otherMockService,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mockResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{timeout,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into mock_config
id,
mock_name,
request_type,
mock_url,
prefix_option,
config_rules,
weight,
result_type,
labe,
other_mock_service,
mock_result,
tag,
timeout,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{mockName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{requestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mockUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{prefixOption,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{configRules,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{resultType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{labe,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{otherMockService,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mockResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{timeout,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update mock_config
mock_name = #{mockName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
request_type = #{requestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mock_url = #{mockUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
prefix_option = #{prefixOption,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
config_rules = #{configRules,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
result_type = #{resultType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
labe = #{labe,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
other_mock_service = #{otherMockService,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mock_result = #{mockResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tag = #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
timeout = #{timeout,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update mock_config set mock_name = #{mockName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, request_type = #{requestType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mock_url = #{mockUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, prefix_option = #{prefixOption,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, config_rules = #{configRules,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, result_type = #{resultType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, labe = #{labe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, other_mock_service = #{otherMockService,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mock_result = #{mockResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tag = #{tag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, timeout = #{timeout,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( select * from mock_config order by id DESC )t
order by id DESC
